# Calendars

<script src="deadlines-data.js"></script>
<div id="table-YOUR-NAME"></div>
<script>
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
    buildTable("technical-doc", "table-YOUR-NAME");
  });
</script>

## 📝 Course Activities
![](/411a_winter/images/highlights_explanation.png)
![](/411b_spring/images/course_activities1.png)
![](/411b_spring/images/course_activities2.png)

<br>

## ⏰️ Spring Capstone Deadlines
![](/411b_spring/images/411b_deadlines.png)
